summary: Phase B: Embedding via local Ollama — switch from OpenRouter to nomic-embed-text:v1.5 (deviates from proposal §4)

analysis.author: anonlessness
analysis.content: Phase B branch merged with 4/5 children closed (B6, B6a, B6b, B6c). B7 deferred to Phase C — see B7 analysis. Parent stays open until B7 closes during Phase C work.

resolution.note: All children resolved — B6 (Ollama embed), B6a (.env doc), B6b (docker-compose + README), B6c (loopback systemd unit), B7 (boot-time assertions, landed in Phase C with C10). Local pipeline embeddings switched to Ollama nomic-embed-text:v1.5; runtime app now asserts dim=768 at boot.
